title: RBI Circular on Lead Bank Scheme (Revised)
description: <cite index="42-1,42-2">RBI issued final revised Lead Bank Scheme circular on June 19, 2026 (PR 2026-2027/502), introducing key changes including exclusive Lead District Manager per district, formalised BLBC-driven credit planning, uniform meeting timelines, four SLBC sub-committees, and a 60% CD ratio benchmark</cite>.
